product.description:
Key features:
WhatHiFi 5-Star bookshelf speakers Exceptional value for money with advanced features for the price point Curved braced cabinets help to eliminate vibrations and dissipate standing waves Gold-plated bi-wire connection separates high and low frequencies for enhanced clarity Dual reflex ports enhance overall bass response and clarity
5-year warranty & 30-day money-back guarantee included
Overview: The Wharfedale Diamond 9.1 Bookshelf Speakers are clear and precise with unmatched sound reproduction at their level. They boast curved braced cabinets that not only allude to the premium aesthetic qualities of higher-priced speakers but also help to reduce unwanted cabinet vibrations and dissipate derogatory standing waves that can negatively affect your sound. The five-inch Kevlar mid/bass driver and one-inch textile tweeter work effortlessly together offering sparkling highs and full controlled lows revealing details in your favourite tracks that may have previously gone unheard. The gold-plated bi-wireable binding posts a trait usually only found at higher price ranges ensure complete versatility in your set-up and will benefit those who aim to achieve a precise and clean sound where high and low frequencies blend harmoniously without a fight for air space.

product.product_name: Cello C50WS4K 50" inch Smart WiFi WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV Freeview Play FRAMELESS
product.description:
50вҖі Smart WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV with Freeview Play and Frameless Bezel
50вҖқ 4K Ultra HD LED TV LGвҖҷs Smart operating system, WebOS Hub built-in Download apps through the web browser Freeview HD by Aerial & also a Satellite tuner built-in with Freesat Bluetooth connectivity (easily add a Bluetooth soundbar) Freeview Play with 100 channels and 20,000 hours of free on-demand content 3 x HDMI inputs for your external devices and consoles Can be wall mounted (200mm x 100mm bracket & 4 pcs M5 X8 not included)
The built-in Smart platform, developed by LG, allows you to browse the web and download all your favourite entertainment apps, so you can stream directly to the TV. From Netflix, Prime Video and Disney Plus to YouTube and catch-up apps like BBC iPlayer and ITVx, a world of entertainment awaits.
With Freeview Play you can watch an impressive 60,000+ hours of TV and over 1,500 boxsets, across your favourite on-demand players. All for free.
With the built-in Bluetooth connectivity, you can add a Bluetooth soundbar to the TV. This means cinema sound can be enjoyed without the need for untidy cables. The built-in satellite tuner with Freesat provides access to over 170 channels with 100% channel coverage on a subscription-free basis. Plus, youвҖҷll find your favourite on-demand players all in one place. You will just need to purchase and install your own satellite dish/cabling. The ultimate flat-screen TV with its super-slim bezel and lightweight design is ideal for wall mounting and easy maneuverability
Specification Screen Size 50вҖі Freeview Play Yes DVD Player No USB Yes вҖ“ playback only Contrast Ratio 5000:1 Brightness 250 Max Resolution 3840 x 2160 Speakers 2 x 8W Smart Yes Max Power 120W Energy Rating вҖҳG вҖ“ 71 watts on working and 0.5 watt standby power consumption HDMI 3 Inputs RF Antenna, HDMI X3, CVBS, USB x 2, RJ45 Outputs Digital Audio Out, Earphone Out VESA 200mm x 100mm Dimension w/stand W 1110 x H 733 x D 268 mm Dimensions w/o stand W 1110 x H 644 x D 34 mm Weight 9.1kg

product.product_name: Coffee Machine Espresso Machine Coffee Maker Cappuccino Milk Frother 20 Bar 1.8L
product.description: вң… 20Bar High-Pressure Extraction Equipped with a professional high-pressure water pump, it delivers a stable 20Bar extraction pressure to instantly penetrate coffee grounds, fully releasing the aroma and oils of coffee beans. It easily restoring the rich flavor of authentic espressoвҖ”every sip rivals the quality of specialty cafГ© drinks. вң… 1.8L Large-Capacity Removable Water Tank No need for frequent refills; a full tank can make multiple cups for the whole family, easily handling daily use and small gatherings. The semi-transparent design lets you check water levels at a glance, and the detachable structure, paired with a separate drip tray, makes refilling and cleaning a breezeвҖ”saving time and effort. вң… Food-Grade Stainless Steel Manufacturing The body and core contact parts are made of food-grade stainless steel, which is corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, and durable. It eliminates residual odors, ensuring every cup of coffee is pure and safe, balancing premium texture with practicality. рҹӣ пёҸ All-Inclusive Accessories В· Unlock Diverse Coffee Experiences The machine comes with a complete set of professional accessories, so you can start your home barista journey right out of the box. It balances professionalism and convenience to suit вҳ• Scenario Adaptation В· Perfect for Your Daily Moments рҹҢ… Morning Wake-Up: One-tap espresso, paired with milk for an energizing latte to chase away drowsiness and kickstart a productive day. вҳ• Afternoon Relaxation: Brew a cup of freshly ground coffee with dessert, enjoying a moment of peaceful solitude and elevating your at-home ritual. рҹҘӮ Friend Gatherings: Quick double-cup brewing and a variety of milk-based drinks let you host a cozy coffee party at home. рҹ’ј Office Energy Boost: Fast capsule brewing eliminates waiting time, providing timely energy to enhance work efficiency. рҹ“Ң Product Specifications Extraction Pressure: 20Bar high-pressure extraction Water Tank Capacity: 1.8L large-capacity removable water tank

product.product_name: 11.5" Portable DVD Player with 9.5" Large HD Swivel Screen High Volume Speaker
product.description:
About this item рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗPortable and MagicalгҖ‘-- Compact design makes it easy to carry out with you. Take it on your road trip and get double surprises both on and off the screen. portable DVD player can be easily swiveled as a tablet and mounted to the car headrest, brings tons of fun for your journey. рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗ5 Hrs Battery LifeгҖ‘-- Upgraded battery capacity to 2500mAh, you and your family can watch 1-2 movies without any worries. Our portable DVD player for car provide a certificated AC power adapter and car charger in the package, no more worries about the battery dying out when you are out. рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗProtective and Gorgeous ScreenгҖ‘-- portable DVD player for kids adopts the HD Eye-protective Screen, and refuses the recycled screen, aiming at alleviating eye fatigue caused by the long use, more comfortable and protective screen for your kidsвҖҷ eyes. рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗAll Regions & Multi FormatsгҖ‘-- Supports CD,DVD,VCD,SVCD,CDВұR/ВұRW,DVDВұR/ВұRW from all region (Blu-ray and pirated discs are not supported); DVD player portable also support multi-media files via USB and SD Card (16-32GB), such as VOB, AVI, MPEG, MP3, WMA, JPEG. рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗDual Speakers & Clear SoundгҖ‘-- Portable dvd player with screen equipped with two high-power speakers, which makes the volume louder. There is a 3.5mm earphone jack on the right side of the portable dvd players so that you can get a concentrated and clearer sound for your private viewing. рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗEasy Operation & Seamless ViewingгҖ‘-- DVD player has a simple operating system and a convenient remote control, making it an ideal companion for the kids and elderly. Never miss out on exciting plots, the Break-point memory function can ensure seamless connection of the plot. рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§гҖҗPremium Service & Quick ResponseгҖ‘-- We are committed to providing the best after-sales service to our customers. If you have any questions, concerns, or issues with the your device, we are here to help you 24 hours a day.
вҳ…Eye-protection LCD screenвҳ…: DVD player provide a 800*480 Swivel Screen with 270 degrees rotation and 180 degrees flip. The portable player can be swiveled as a tablet to attache to the car backseat to play. вҳ…Super High Batteryвҳ…: Upgrade battery capacity to 2 times as the original ones, ensures the 5 hours play time. Not enough? Free car charger provided in the package. вҳ…Resume Playвҳ…: Support break-point memory function, make it possible to start from where you left at last time, no need to start again. вҳ…Game Playerвҳ…: This DVD player is more than a DVD player, we provide a free game controller in our package, kids also can use this to play 180 kinds of retro games, such as super Mario etc. Note: customer need do download game cd by yourself. вҳ…Multi-Mediaвҳ…: Directly play in formats: CD, DVD, CD-R/RW, DVD-R/+R, DVD+RW/-RW, VCD, SVCD; USB and SD Card supported: MP3/WMA/WAV, JPEG, MPEG2/AVI, TXT.
The new version of portable DVD player. 3 years in portable DVD player make us understand your needs better and make prodcuts more better.
Your Home Cinema always with You: Our Portable DVD Player has a built-in USB port that allows you to enjoy your favorite movies while travelling, camping, sightseeing,you can also copy your CD files to USB or SD card. Improved battery: Improved 2000mAh Lithium battery extend the play time to 5 hours,even the adapter was left at home,do not need to worry about losing battery power whilst watching a movie.
Break Point memory: Break Point memory function make it possible to start from where you end at last time. Sync to your TV Screen: With the included AV cable, it's available to transmit the screen from DVD player to your TV to enjoy a bigger and clearer screen. Fantastic Swivel Screen: portable DVD player with 9.5 inch 270В° rotation and 180В° flip screen make it possible to attach to the car headrest and make you enjoy your time when you are on boring road trip.
Package Including: 1x Portable DVD player 1x AV cable 1x Remote controller 1x Power adapter 1x Car charger 1x User manual

product.product_name: 2 Packs 6AH For Makita 18V Battery Li-Ion BL1830 BL1850 BL1840 BL1860B LXT400
Bluetooth FM Transmitter Car Kit MP3 Player USB Charger Handsfree Adapter UK
product.description:
Upgrade your driving experience with this multifunctional Car Charger Bluetooth adapter. Combining hands-free calling, music streaming, and rapid charging, itвҖҷs the perfect companion for every journey. Designed with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology, it delivers high-speed charging while keeping your devices connected safely.
вӯҗ Key Features Bluetooth 5.0 Connectivity: Stable, fast pairing with smartphones for calls, music, and navigation audio. FM Transmitter Function: Stream your favorite playlists directly to your car stereo via FM radio. Dual USB Fast Charging Ports: Supports rapid charging for multiple devices simultaneously. MP3 Player Support: Play music from USB drives or SD cards effortlessly. Hands-Free Calling: Clear audio with built-in microphone ensures safe driving. Compact & Universal Design: Fits all standard car cigarette lighter sockets and works with most vehicles.
рҹ“Ҡ Technical Specs Bluetooth Version: 5.0 Input: DC 12-24V Output: 5V/2.4A per USB port Frequency Range: 87.5вҖ“108MHz Compatible Formats: MP3/WMA/WAV LED Display: Shows FM frequency and device info
рҹ’Ў Benefits Charge your phone and other devices quickly with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology. Enjoy seamless music streaming without tangled wires. Stay safe with hands-free calling while driving. Compact design keeps your dashboard neat and organized.
рҹҺҜ Ideal For Daily commuters who need fast device charging and music on the go. Road trips and long drives requiring hands-free calls and entertainment. Anyone who wants to upgrade an older car stereo to Bluetooth functionality. Drivers with multiple devices needing simultaneous fast charging.
рҹҢҗ Vast Applications Cars, SUVs, trucks, and other vehicles with cigarette lighter sockets. Listening to music or podcasts from smartphones, USB drives, or SD cards. Hands-free calls during work commutes, rideshare driving, or family trips. Charging smartphones, tablets, GPS devices, power banks, and other USB devices. Enhancing older car stereos with FM broadcasting and Bluetooth connectivity.

product.product_name: Mini Pocket Umbrella Folding Compact Rain Windproof Anti UV 5 Folding Travel UK
product.description:
Stay protected in every season with this sleek and ultra-portable Mini Pocket Compact Fold Umbrella. Designed for modern lifestyles, it combines Rain Windproof durability with Anti UV protection, making it the perfect everyday travel essential.
вӯҗ Key Features рҹҢ§ Rain Windproof Design вҖ“ Strong frame for reliable performance in wind & rain вҳҖпёҸ Anti UV Protection вҖ“ Helps block harmful sun rays on hot days рҹ‘ң Ultra Compact & Pocket Size вҖ“ Easy to carry anywhere, anytime вҡЎ Quick Open & Fold вҖ“ Simple, hassle-free operation рҹҺ’ Travel Case Included вҖ“ Clean and convenient storage рҹ’Ә Durable Build вҖ“ Premium materials for long-term use

рҹҢҚ Ideal For рҹҢ§ Rainy Days вҖ“ Stay dry during sudden showers вҳҖпёҸ Super Sunny Days вҖ“ Reliable shade with Anti UV protection рҹҚӮ Autumn & Winter вҖ“ Handles wet and windy conditions рҹҢё Spring Showers вҖ“ Perfect for unpredictable weather рҹҢһ Summer Heat вҖ“ Use as a portable sunshade рҹҢҰ All-Season Use вҖ“ One umbrella for every condition
рҹ”„ Vast Application of Usage Designed to make your life easier, this umbrella is perfect for:
рҹҡ¶ Daily Use вҖ“ Commuting, school runs, office travel рҹӣҚ Shopping Trips вҖ“ Stay comfortable while out and about вңҲпёҸ Travel & Holidays вҖ“ Compact size fits easily in luggage рҹҡ— On-the-Go Protection вҖ“ Keep in your car or bag for emergencies рҹҺү Outdoor Events вҖ“ Festivals, sports days, gatherings рҹҸ• Outdoor Activities вҖ“ Walking, hiking, camping рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§ For Everyone вҖ“ Suitable for men, women, and kids рҹ‘ү No confusion, no hassle вҖ” one simple solution for all your weather needs
рҹҺҜ Why Choose This Umbrella? вң” Dual-purpose Rain Windproof & Anti UV protection вң” Compact, lightweight, and easy to carry вң” Reliable in all weather conditions вң” Practical design for everyday convenience
рҹҡҖ Benefits YouвҖҷll Love Stay dry and protected anytime, anywhere Enjoy peace of mind with all-in-one weather protection Carry effortlessly without bulk Dependable performance you can trust

product.product_name: Bike Seat Cover Soft Gel Saddle Bicycle Padded Cushioned Extra Comfort UK
product.description:
Soft Gel Bike Seat Cover Padded Cushion Saddle вҖ“ Universal Fit for Maximum Comfort рҹҡҙ Upgrade your cycling experience with this premium Soft Gel Bike Seat Cover, designed to deliver exceptional Padded Comfort on every ride. Whether commuting, exercising, or riding long distances, enjoy a smoother, pain-free journey.
вӯҗ Key Features Soft Gel Padding вҖ“ Advanced cushioning absorbs shock and reduces pressure Padded Comfort Design вҖ“ Extra-thick padding for long rides Secure Anti-Slip Fit вҖ“ Non-slip base with adjustable drawstring Breathable Design вҖ“ Airflow channel reduces heat and moisture Water-Resistant вҖ“ Protects from sweat and light rain Universal Fit вҖ“ Fits most standard bike saddles рҹ’Һ Premium Quality & Material High-grade soft gel with high-density memory foam Premium Lycra fabric вҖ“ breathable and stretchable Reinforced stitching for durability Anti-slip textured base for stability Maintains shape after long-term use рҹ“җ Technical Specifications Material: Soft Gel + High-Density Foam + Lycra Fabric Size: Approx. 27.5 x 17 cm Weight: Lightweight & portable Compatibility: Fits most bike saddles Installation: Easy slip-on with drawstring рҹҺҜ Ideal For Daily commuters and city cyclists Long-distance and endurance riders Indoor cycling and spin classes Mountain and road biking Beginners needing extra comfort рҹҢҚ Vast Applications Road bikes вҖ“ long-distance comfort Mountain bikes вҖ“ shock absorption City bikes вҖ“ daily commuting Exercise bikes вҖ“ home workouts Hybrid bikes вҖ“ mixed terrain Leisure cycling вҖ“ casual rides Travel & touring вҖ“ portable comfort вң… Benefits Ride longer without discomfort Reduces pressure on sensitive areas Improves performance and endurance Quick installation вҖ“ no tools needed

product.product_name: Anti Mosquito Insect & Bug Repellent Bracelet Bands Silicone Wristband 1- 20 PK
product.description: вӯҗ Key Features Effective Mosquito Protection вҖ“ Helps repel mosquitoes and insects naturally Safe & DEET-Free вҖ“ Infused with natural plant-based essential oils Adjustable & Flexible Fit вҖ“ Comfortable silicone design for adults and children Long-Lasting Use вҖ“ Provides extended protection for hours Portable & Easy вҖ“ Wear on wrist, ankle, or attach anywhere Multiple Colors вҖ“ Fun and vibrant options Value Packs вҖ“ Available in 1вҖ“20 PCS options рҹ“Ҡ Technical Specifications Material: High-quality silicone Active Ingredients: Natural essential oils (citronella, eucalyptus, etc.) Size: One-size-fits-most (adjustable) Usage Time: Several hours per band (varies by environment) Application: Wrist, ankle, bags, strollers Pack Options: 1, 5, 10, 15, or 20 pieces вң… Benefits No sprays, no skin irritation, no mess Family-friendly for kids and adults Lightweight, waterproof, and travel-ready Great alternative to traditional repellents рҹҺҜ Ideal For Camping, hiking, fishing, and outdoor adventures Travel, holidays, and picnics Gardening, BBQs, and sports activities Everyday use at home or school рҹҢҚ Vast Applications of Usage Outdoor: camping, trekking, cycling, beach trips Home & garden: backyard, lawn work, evening relaxation Kids: school, playgrounds, daycare Travel: airports, hotels, tropical destinations Work: fishing, farming, construction, warehouses Pet walks: parks, trails, wooded areas Daily use: shopping, commuting, casual outings рҹҡҡ Free Shipping Fast & reliable delivery Secure packaging for safe arrival No extra charges

product.product_name: Juicer Lemon Squeezer Citrus Juice Hand Held Stainless Steel Fruit Orange
product.description: Key Features Perfect Squeeze Technology вҖ“ Extracts maximum juice with minimal effort Durable Stainless Steel Build вҖ“ Rust-resistant and long-lasting Ergonomic Handle Design вҖ“ Comfortable grip for easy squeezing No Seeds, No Mess вҖ“ Built-in filter keeps juice smooth Easy to Clean вҖ“ Dishwasher safe and quick rinse cleaning Used for Variety of Fruits вҖ“ Ideal for lemons, limes, and small oranges рҹ“җ Technical Specifications Material: Premium Stainless Steel Type: Handheld Manual Juicer Color: Silver Size: Compact & portable Weight: Lightweight yet durable Cleaning: Dishwasher safe рҹ’Ў Benefits Saves time compared to manual squeezing Extracts more juice with less waste Keeps hands clean and irritation-free Ideal for home, bars, and restaurants Compact for easy storage and travel рҹҺҜ What It Is Ideal For Making fresh lemon and lime juice Preparing cocktails and refreshing drinks Adding flavor to salads, marinades, and dishes Baking desserts and pastries Daily kitchen and professional use рҹҢҚ Vast Applications of Usage Beverages вҖ“ lemon water, smoothies, iced tea Cooking вҖ“ seafood, chicken, sauces, vegetables Salads вҖ“ fresh citrus dressings Baking вҖ“ cakes, tarts, desserts Bar use вҖ“ cocktails like margaritas & mojitos Natural cleaning вҖ“ eco-friendly lemon solutions DIY beauty вҖ“ skincare and hair remedies Outdoor use вҖ“ picnics, camping, travel

product.product_name: EMERGENCY HAMMER CAR WINDOW BREAKER SEATBELT CUTTER BREAK GLASS ESCAPE SAFETY UK
product.description:
EMERGENCY HAMMER Car Window Breaker & Seatbelt Cutter вҖ“ Essential Vehicle Escape Safety Tool (UK Stock)
Be fully prepared for unexpected emergencies with this highвҖ‘quality EMERGENCY HAMMER featuring a WINDOW BREAKER & SEATBELT CUTTER. Designed for rapid response, this compact yet durable tool can make a critical difference when seconds matter.
вӯҗ Key Features вң” 2-in-1 Emergency Design вҖ“ Heavy-duty window breaker & seatbelt cutter in one compact tool вң” Hardened Steel Hammer Head вҖ“ Instantly shatters side windows in emergency situations вң” Sharp Concealed Blade вҖ“ Quickly cuts jammed or locked seatbelts вң” Non-Slip Anti-Skid Handle вҖ“ Firm grip for safe and controlled use вң” High-Visibility Red Body вҖ“ Easy to locate in stressful situations вң” Protective Mounting Bracket вҖ“ Secure and convenient storage within reach вң” Compact & Lightweight вҖ“ Fits glove box, door pocket, or centre console
рҹ”§ Technical Specifications Material: High-carbon hardened steel hammer head Handle: Durable ABS with anti-slip grip Blade: Stainless steel concealed safety blade Length: Approx. 17cm Weight: Approx. 130вҖ“150g Colour: Red Condition: Brand New Stock Location: UK
рҹҢҚ Vast Application of Usage This EMERGENCY HAMMER is suitable for a wide range of vehicles and emergency situations:
рҹҡ— Private cars & family vehicles рҹҡ• Taxis, Uber & ride-share vehicles рҹҡҡ Vans, trucks & delivery fleets рҹҡҢ Buses & minibuses рҹҡҗ Motorhomes & caravans рҹҡ“ Emergency & service vehicles рҹҡӨ Boats & marine vehicles рҹҸў Workplace fleet vehicles рҹҺ’ Travel safety kits & roadside emergency kits Perfect for emergencies involving:
Vehicle submersion in water Electrical or central locking failure Car fires Severe collisions Jammed doors after impact
рҹӣЎ Key Benefits вң” Enables fast escape when doors cannot be opened вң” Cuts seatbelts instantly to prevent entrapment вң” Provides peace of mind for drivers and passengers вң” A small investment for potentially life-saving protection
рҹ“Ұ Package Includes 1 Г— EMERGENCY HAMMER 1 Г— Mounting Bracket

product.product_name: Strong Vacuum Suction Cup Hook Shower Towel-Holder Hooks for Bathroom Kitchen UK
product.description:

With powerful suction grip and a modern design, they securely hold towels, bags, and accessories on smooth surfaces while keeping your space neat and clutter-free.

Colour Options Silver, Black, Gold, White Use Bathroom, Kitchen, Home Organisation рҹҺҜ IDEAL FOR вң” Towels & bath accessories вң” Kitchen utensils вң” Handbags & keys вң” Clothes & hats вң” Shower accessories рҹ“Ұ PACKAGE OPTIONS вң” 1 Г— Hook вң” 2 Г— Hooks (Value Pack) вҡ пёҸ INSTALLATION TIPS Suitable for smooth surfaces only (tiles, glass, metal, wood) Not suitable for painted or rough walls Press firmly and wait 24 hours before use рҹ”Ҙ MULTI-BUY OFFERS рҹ’° Buy More Save More рҹ’° Quantity discounts available Check offer section above for latest deals

product.product_name: Mens Body Shaper Compression Vest Slimming Shirt Tank Chest Belly Men's Waist UK
product.description:
рҹ”Ҙ PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Achieve a more confident look instantly with this MenвҖҷs Slimming Compression Vest, designed to shape your chest, flatten your stomach, and support better posture. Made from a breathable stretch fabric, this vest provides firm compression while remaining comfortable for all-day wear.
Perfect for daily wear, gym workouts, or under clothing for a slimmer appearance. Lightweight, flexible, and discreet under shirts for everyday confidence.

Perfect for daily wear, work, travel, or casual comfort, these briefs combine practicality with elegant style while providing a smooth and comfortable fit under clothing.

product.product_name: Portable Zipper Eye Glasses Hard Case Sunglass Reading Cover Box Protector Gift
product.description:
рҹ”Ҙ PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Keep your glasses safe and stylish with this Fashion Denim Fabric Glasses Case. Made from high-quality cotton denim, this soft-shell case features a smooth zipper closure and a trendy patchwork pattern. Perfect for sunglasses, reading glasses, or prescription eyewear.
The lightweight yet protective design prevents scratches, dust, and damage while you're on the go. A must-have accessory for anyone who wants to keep their glasses organized and protected.
вӯҗ KEY FEATURES рҹ”№ Premium Denim Fabric вҖ“ High-quality cotton, soft yet durable рҹ”№ Zipper Closure вҖ“ Secure, smooth-gliding zipper keeps glasses safely inside рҹ”№ Scratch Protection вҖ“ Soft interior lining prevents lens scratches рҹ”№ Fashion Patchwork Design вҖ“ Trendy and unisex style for men and women рҹ”№ Universal Size вҖ“ Fits most sunglasses, reading glasses, and prescription eyewear рҹ”№ Lightweight & Portable вҖ“ Easy to carry in purse, backpack, or pocket рҹ”№ Great Gift Idea вҖ“ Perfect for glasses wearers, travelers, or fashion lovers рҹ“Ӣ PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Soft Shell Eyeglasses Case / Sunglasses Pouch Material Denim Fabric (Cotton) вҖ“ No high-concerned chemicals Closure Zipper Pattern Type Patchwork Dimensions (approx.) Length: 16cm (6.3вҖі), Width: 6cm (2.4вҖі), Height: 3.5cm (1.4вҖі) Weight Approx. 106g (3.7 oz) Gender Unisex Brand UNBRANDED Origin China Package Included 1 Г— Eyeglasses Box / Case
